_comment: Xiao Bai (小白) — Renegade Immortal. Canon confidence: 5/5. Prime Directive: this beast exists objectively whether the player has the perception to recognize it.
name: Xiao Bai

canonical.appearance: Small white beast resembling a fox-dog hybrid. Cute appearance but is actually a powerful ancient beast. Wang Lin found it as a companion.

inner_dan_properties.alchemy_use: No alchemy value — common beast with no condensed inner core
inner_dan_properties.canon_note: xiao_bai — common beast, no condensed inner core
